cards.front: Second Order Linear Homogeneous Recurrence Relation
cards.back: A recurrence relation of the form $a_n = r_1a_{n-1} + r_2a_{n-2}$, where r1 and r2 are constants.
A recurrence relation where all terms are dependent on previous terms, i.e., $a_n = f(a_{n-1}, a_{n-2})$.
In a recurrence relation, the coefficients of the previous terms are constants, not functions of the term index.
A polynomial equation formed by substituting $a_n = r^n$ into the recurrence relation, used to find the general solution.
The solution to the recurrence relation, often expressed in terms of the roots of the characteristic equation.
